easyEWAS 1.1.0
  • Home
  • Quickstart
  • Tutorial
  • FAQ
  • Reference

Package index

All functions

  • batchEWAS() : Perform batch effect correction
  • bootEWAS() : Perform Bootstrap-based Internal Validation
  • dmrEWAS() : Perform Differentially Methylated Region analysis
  • downloadAnnotEWAS() : Download and cache chip annotation tables
  • enrichEWAS() : Enrichment analyses
  • initEWAS() : Initialize the EWAS module
  • loadEWAS() : Load all data files for EWAS module
  • methydata : Example Methylation Matrix
  • plotEWAS() : Visualize the results of EWAS analysis
  • sampledata : Example Sample Metadata
  • startEWAS() : Perform EWAS Analysis
  • transEWAS() : Convert variable type of sample data

Developed by Yuting Wang, Xu Gao.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
